Welcome to GN-db site

. Directions Below ↓ .

\


1. **↖** Go to the Data URi section  . ⋮☰ .

2.  Copy the Data URi: (ctrl+a), (ctrl+c)

   1. CRASH WARNING - CLOSE ALL OTHER TABS!

3. Right Click on Bookmarks bar

4. Click Paste 

   1. VERY Extremely helpful diagram:

![](data:image/png;base64,)

5. Open bookmark

\


This cant be blocked cuz data URi (i dont think) so share with who ever you want

The district can see emails

Changelog:

v.1.3 - 3/8/25 

Fixed a UTF-8 data to ISO-8859-1 conversion error

Fixed an issue where the side bar text was not vertically aligned

Added Favorites

Added the MOST aWSOME text shadows ever.
